title: Halliburton Announces Redemption of 3.50% Senior Notes Due 2023
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #debtreduction--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) announced today that it has called for redemption the entire outstanding principal amount of its 3.50% Senior Notes due 2023 (the “Notes”). The redemption date for the Notes is September 25, 2022. The aggregate principal amount of the Notes currently outstanding is $600,061,000.
